notes: No direct or indirect adapter leakage detected in port headers; all platform-specific library (LS2K0300) usage is encapsulated within implementation files and gated behind __has_include.
Composition-root discipline is maintained in new/user/main.cpp, which handles wiring via a PlatformBundle and hands off to project-owned contracts.
Startup fail-safe behavior is correctly implemented in new/code/runtime/startup.cpp, ensuring actuators are only armed if critical parameters are applied and adapters are ready.
Hardware-profile markers and modes (direct-match, adaptation-hook, disabled) are explicitly handled in adapters and documented in new/docs/hardware-matrix.md.
Camera-contract enforcement (160x120 -> 160x128 adaptation) is correctly implemented in new/code/platform/camera_adapter.cpp with appropriate geometry markers.
Foreground-perception publication is performed outside PIT callback in new/code/runtime/perception_frontend.cpp as required.
LS2K0300 stack equivalence is documented and verified in the provided codex review and confirmed by code analysis.
